mapper.select: SELECT id, email, full_name, password_hash, auth_provider, bio, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at FROM app_users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, email, full_name, password_hash, auth_provider, bio, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at FROM app_users WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_users ( id, email, full_name, password_hash, auth_provider ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{email}, #{fullName}, #{passwordHash}, #{authProvider} )
mapper.update: UPDATE app_users SET full_name = #{fullName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_users SET full_name = #{fullName}, bio = #{bio}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
